hypothesis: If SSNEB calculations for CsPbI3 and TiO2 phase transformations are initialized from minimum-energy pathways predicted by pretrained equivariant ML surrogates (EquiformerV2 or eSEN), then subsequent DFT refinement will recover the same transition states and energy barriers as VASP-only runs while requiring significantly fewer iterations and compute time, because the ML surrogates provide sufficiently accurate energies, forces, and stresses to start near the true MEP.
